economic_notes: First Nation holds 14.28% equity interest in UCCMLP (building material supply) and 16.66% equity interest in MMPLP (power limited partnership), both accounted for under modified equity method. Beneficiary of Robinson Huron Treaty Trust with proportional loan guarantee of $188,090.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021; audit letter dated April 1, 2022 and auditors report signed March 24, 2022. Two government business partnerships (GBEs) accounted for under modified equity method: UCCMLP and MMPLP. Federal funding of $2,132,782 includes ISC ($2,058,941), CMHC ($49,315), and Health Canada ($24,526). Total government transfers calculated as Provincial ($745,392) + Federal ($2,132,782) = $2,878,174. OSR = $4,562,484 - $2,878,174 = $1,684,310. Housing expenses combined Housing and Community Property ($330,607) and Social Housing ($102,908) = $433,515. No schedule of remuneration amounts included in the provided text. Current liabilities not separately disclosed in provided text. COVID-19 impact noted in financial statements.
